message:
feat(transport): expand transport layer with typed sink/stream extensions and infrastructure

Transport:
- transport/sink.rs: Add SymbolSinkExt trait with send_authenticated(),
  send_batch(), flush_with_cx(), and close_with_cx() extension methods.
  Implement channel-based ChannelSink with bounded backpressure and Cx
  cancellation integration. Includes comprehensive inline tests.
- transport/stream.rs: Add SymbolStreamExt trait with recv_authenticated(),
  recv_batch(), and recv_timeout() extensions. ChannelStream implementation
  with take-from-shared-buffer semantics. Inline tests for single/batch/
  timeout/cancellation paths.
- transport/mod.rs: Add inline tests for channel() constructor exercising
  send/recv, backpressure, and close semantics.

Service:
- service/builder.rs: Add ServiceBuilder with fluent .layer(), .timeout(),
  .retry(), .rate_limit(), and .concurrency_limit() methods for composing
  service middleware stacks. Includes tests for builder chain composition.
- service/layer.rs: Add From<Box<dyn Layer>> and Eq impls for LayerStack.

Stream:
- stream/take.rs: Add TakeStream combinator that yields at most N items
  from an inner stream, with Cx-aware polling. Tests for exact count,
  zero take, and inner-shorter-than-limit cases.

Sync/Channel/Time:
- sync/notify.rs: Extend Notify with notify_all(), waiter_count(),
  and comprehensive tests for single/multi notification, cancel safety.
- channel/watch.rs: Add has_changed(), mark_seen(), and borrow_and_mark()
  convenience methods with tests.
- time/intrusive_wheel.rs: Add remove_expired_batch() for bulk timer
  expiration and wheel statistics. Tests for batch removal.
- time/timeout_future.rs: Refactor to use timeout_at() internally,
  add from_deadline() constructor.

Bytes:
- bytes/buf/buf_trait.rs: Add try_get_bytes() fallible variant and
  has_remaining_at_least() predicate.
- bytes/buf/chain.rs: Fix Chain::advance to use saturating subtraction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
